top_signals.title: Oil prices jump 3% after Iran says it targeted U.S. airbase following fresh American strikes
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose on Thursday after fresh U.S. strikes in Iran renewed concerns over disruptions to commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Government urges transport firms to guard against AI misuse
top_signals.summary: The instructions were made at a meeting with operators from six infrastructure sectors, also including ports, airports, logistics and water supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
